pages.title: 关于我
pages.text: 教育信息 计算机硕士在读 北京邮电大学 (BUPT),2018-至今 计算机科学与技术学士, 重庆大学, 2014-2018 获奖 (都是不值一提的小奖状😢) 重庆大学乙等奖学金 重庆大学大学生科研训练计划SRTP优秀项目结题 中国大学生计算机设计大赛全国二等奖 项目 墨旅 Unity3D游戏开发 参赛作品，和同学共同制作，受经典游戏 Okami大神 启发，将2D平台跳跃和神笔马良的游戏方式结合(项目暂停) 配色笔记 项目颜色搭配笔记本 iOS独立开发作品，为设计师记录项目中的使用到的配色方案，可以用于网站，APP或者游戏等项目的配色记录。(已上架) 学术 机器学习/迁移学习 联系方式 邮件：cdxcqu2014@163.com Office：630, No.3 Teaching Building, No. 10 Xitucheng Road, Haidian District, Beijing

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: [实验代码]深度鸡尾酒网络Deep Cocktail Network: Multi-source Unsupervised Domain Adaptation with Category Shift
posts.text: 置信度论文中，置信度计算公式：$$\sum_{c \in \mathcal{C}_{s_{j}}} \frac{\mathcal{S}{c f}\left(x^{t} ; F, D{s_{j}}\right)}{\sum_{c \in \mathcal{C}_{s_{k}}} \mathcal{S}{c f}\left(x^{t} ; F, D{s_{k}}\right)} C_{s_{j}}\left(c | F\left(x^{t}\right)\right)$$其中：$$C_{s_{j}}\left(c | F\left(x^{t}\right)\right)$$指的是一个样本的softmax值，这里的计算从下面的程序中得到12345678910s1_cls = s1_classifier(t_feature)s2_cls = s2_classifier(t_feature)s1_cls = F.softmax(s1_cls)s2_cls = F.softmax(s2_cls)s1_cls = s1_cls.data.cpu().numpy()s2_cls = s2_cls.data.cpu().numpy()#因为两个源域 share category,#s1_weight，s2_weight带有混淆值perplexity score信息的权值t_pred = s1_cls * s1_weight + s2_cls * s2_weightids = t_pred.argmax(axis=1) 公式中分子分母通过这样计算得到123#置信度权重的计算s1_weight = s1_weight_loss / (s1_weight_loss + s2_weight_loss)s2_weight = s2_weight_loss / (s1_weight_loss + s2_weight_loss) perplexity 计算在实验代码第三部分，训练更新D和F的时候，计算perplexity123456789101112131415161718192021for i, (t_imgs, t_labels) in tqdm.tqdm(enumerate(t_loader)):"""**some code"""extractor.zero_grad()s1_feature = extractor(s1_imgs)s2_feature = extractor(s2_imgs)t_feature = extractor(t_imgs)s1_cls = s1_classifier(s1_feature)s2_cls = s2_classifier(s2_feature)s1_t_fake = s1_t_discriminator(s1_feature)s1_t_real = s1_t_discriminator(t_feature)s2_t_fake = s2_t_discriminator(s2_feature)s2_t_real = s2_t_discriminator(t_feature)s1_cls_loss = get_cls_loss(s1_cls, s1_labels)s2_cls_loss = get_cls_loss(s2_cls, s2_labels)s1_t_dis_loss = get_dis_loss(s1_t_fake, s1_t_real)s2_t_dis_loss = get_dis_loss(s2_t_fake, s2_t_real)#下面来更新perplexitys1_weight_loss += s1_t_dis_loss.data[0]s2_weight_loss += s2_t_dis_loss.data[0] 用假标签训练F和两个C 合并源域和目标域数据 1234s1_t_imgs = torch.cat((s1_imgs, t_pse_imgs), 0)s1_t_labels = torch.cat((s1_labels, t_pse_labels), 0)s2_t_imgs = torch.cat((s2_imgs, t_pse_imgs), 0)s2_t_labels = torch.cat((s2_labels, t_pse_labels), 0) backward() 12345678s1_t_feature = extractor(s1_t_imgs)s2_t_feature = extractor(s2_t_imgs)s1_t_cls = s1_classifier(s1_t_feature)s2_t_cls = s2_classifier(s2_t_feature)s1_t_cls_loss = get_cls_loss(s1_t_cls, s1_t_labels)s2_t_cls_loss = get_cls_loss(s2_t_cls, s2_t_labels)torch.autograd.backward([s1_t_cls_loss, s2_t_cls_loss]) 找到与目标域最接近的源域更新F$$j^{*}=\overset{N}{\underset{j}{\arg\max }}{ \sum^{M}{i}-\log D{s_{j}}\left(F\left(x_{i}^{s_{j}}\right)\right)-\log\left(1-D_{s_{j}}\left(F\left(x_{i}^{t}\right)\right)\right) }^{N}_{j=1}$$这部分的程序：12345678910#这里就是在选择j',只有两个源域#update D by eq.4 if s1_t_dis_loss.data[0] > s2_t_dis_loss.data[0]: SELECTIVE_SOURCE = "S1" torch.autograd.backward([s1_cls_loss, s2_cls_loss, s1_t_confusion_loss])else: SELECTIVE_SOURCE = "S2" torch.autograd.backward([s1_cls_loss, s2_cls_loss, s2_t_confusion_loss])#这里只更新了F，没有更新C，Doptim_extract.step() 域混淆用来更新F，域对抗目标用来更新D1234567891011121314s1_t_discriminator.zero_grad()s2_t_discriminator.zero_grad()#detach是为了只更新 discriminators1_t_fake = s1_t_discriminator(s1_feature.detach())s1_t_real = s1_t_discriminator(t_feature.detach())s2_t_fake = s2_t_discriminator(s2_feature.detach())s2_t_real = s2_t_discriminator(t_feature.detach())#domain loss 这样计算：D_loss = torch.mean(dis_fake ** 2) + torch.mean((dis_real - 1) ** 2) 结果是一个单独的scalar数s1_t_dis_loss = get_dis_loss(s1_t_fake, s1_t_real)s2_t_dis_loss = get_dis_loss(s2_t_fake, s2_t_real)torch.autograd.backward([s1_t_dis_loss, s2_t_dis_loss])optim_s1_t_dis.step()optim_s2_t_dis.step()
